Watch Flow.description: Creates a @watch directive that observes a file or directory for changes.

Watch Atomic with Error Handling.description: Full @watch pipeline with @atomic and on_fail error handling.

Atomic Block.description: Creates an @atomic block with on_fail error handler.

Filter.description: Filter items using a lambda predicate.

Filter with Branch.description: Filter items and pipe results into a branch.

Filter as Binding.description: Filter items with an alias binding into a branch.

Map.description: Transform each item using a lambda.

Import.description: Import a module with an alias.

Read and Parse CSV.description: Read a file and parse it as CSV data.

Branch.description: Creates a branch with multiple parallel flows.

On Fail.description: Error handler block that catches errors from the preceding pipe flow.

Pipe to File.description: Pipe a value into a file.

Read File.description: Reads the contents of a file.

Write File.description: Writes the current pipe value to a file.

Function Definition with Branch.description: Define a function with a branch body.

Log.description: Logs the current pipe value to stdout.
